name: MikroTik ATL 5G R16
title: MikroTik ATL 5G R16
title_extended: MikroTik ATL 5G R16 – Outdoor 5G Antenna with Integrated Router
short_description: Outdoor 5G router with integrated 4x4 MIMO directional antenna, Quectel RG520F-EU 5G modem, supports 5G NR Sub-6GHz, LTE Cat20 (2.0 Gbps download), 1x Gigabit Ethernet port, 512 MB RAM, 32 MB storage, dual SIM (Micro-SIM + eSIM), RouterOS L3. Features IP66 weatherproof enclosure, PoE-in support, wide operating temperature range (-40°C to 70°C).
description: The MikroTik ATL 5G R16 (ATLGM&RG520F-EU) is a powerful outdoor LTE/5G modem designed for fast, stable, and secure wireless internet connectivity in remote and urban environments. It features a built-in Quectel 5G modem (model RG520F-EU) supporting 5G NR, LTE FDD, LTE TDD, and 3G technologies., offering a wide range of band support for flexible deployment across Europe and beyond. With support for Sub-6GHz 5G and LTE Cat 20, it delivers ultra-fast speeds and low latency, making it ideal for streaming, remote work, industrial monitoring, or serving as the backbone of rural internet access. The ATL 5G R16 includes a Gigabit Ethernet port, passive PoE-in support (12–57 V), and a durable outdoor-rated enclosure with IP-rated protection, ensuring consistent performance in harsh weather conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable 5G Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik ATL 5G R16 (ATLGM&RG520F-EU) is a powerful outdoor LTE/5G modem designed for fast, stable, and secure wireless internet connectivity in remote and urban environments. It features a built-in Quectel 5G modem (model RG520F-EU) supporting 5G NR, LTE FDD, LTE TDD, and 3G technologies., offering a wide range of band support for flexible deployment across Europe and beyond. With support for Sub-6GHz 5G and LTE Cat 20, it delivers ultra-fast speeds and low latency, making it ideal for streaming, remote work, industrial monitoring, or serving as the backbone of rural internet access. The ATL 5G R16 includes a Gigabit Ethernet port, passive PoE-in support (12–57 V), and a durable outdoor-rated enclosure with IP-rated protection, ensuring consistent performance in harsh weather conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Antenna Design
detailed_description.text: Equipped with an integrated 4x4 MIMO directional antenna, the ATL 5G R16 offers significantly enhanced signal acquisition and throughput. This high-gain antenna design ensures excellent performance even in areas with weak signal coverage, making it ideal for long-distance cellular connectivity. The device supports dual SIM slots for failover or multi-operator configurations, maximizing uptime and reliability. The advanced antenna array provides optimized spatial stream separation, improving download / upload speeds and enhancing link stability. Its directional panel construction minimizes interference from surrounding sources and boosts signal targeting precision. The ATL 5G R16 is particularly suited for use in rural or off-grid locations, where signal optimization is critical. The rugged design includes integrated grounding and surge protection, ensuring a long-lasting and stable installation in challenging outdoor environments.

detailed_description.heading: Scalable and Secure
detailed_description.text: Built on MikroTik’s robust RouterOS v7 platform, the ATL 5G R16 offers a full suite of networking features, including firewall, NAT, VPN, DHCP, routing, and wireless management tools. Its powerful system resources including 256 MB RAM and 16 MB NOR flash ensure smooth performance for both basic and advanced configurations. The Gigabit Ethernet port provides seamless integration into existing wired infrastructure, while the PoE support simplifies remote installations. Security is prioritized with customizable firewall rules, access control, and VPN support for secure remote access. Whether used as a primary internet gateway or as a backup WAN connection, the ATL 5G R16 is an excellent solution for ISPs, enterprises, farms, or remote installations requiring reliable high-speed wireless access. With global certifications and future-proof 5G technology, it's designed for scalable and secure deployments.

comments.name: Mohammed
comments.text:
Seamless Experience and Excellent Service

The entire order process was smooth—I never needed to contact support, and all tracking details were provided promptly. I had searched for this product across multiple sites, but only Getic had the newer model available. I truly salute their excellent service and product quality. Just a small note: if the global shipping cost and product pricing could be a bit more competitive, it would make the experience even better. Still, highly recommended!
